ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., F, G, F-G) */,
  "birth_day" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the player */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "player_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Central, Southeast, Pacific, Northwest, Southwest) */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "team_arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Point Guard, Shooting Guard, Small Forward) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position (e.g., PG, SG, SF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-position mapping */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., Points, Rebounds, Assists) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistic is recorded (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "statistic_date" TEXT /* Date of the statistic (for tracking changes over time) */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the contract */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., guaranteed, non-guaranteed) */,
  "contract_options" TEXT /* Contract options (e.g., player option, team option) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  "country_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_peak" INTEGER /* Pick number of the player */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_position" TEXT /* Position at which the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  "college_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the college's logo */,
  "college_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was founded */,
  "college_ranking" INTEGER /* National ranking of the college (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_colleges" (
  "player_college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-college mapping */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_colleges_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_colleges_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
